Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw: {"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","opinion":"As a mechanic in Chicago balancing part-time work, clear communication is key when tackling conversations on healthcare, especially around COVID vaccines. With diverse clientele akin to my own circle of hiking and birdwatching friends, it's important to approach these talks factually yet empathetically. Recognizing varying education levels—like one parent with a bachelor's degree—I tailor explanations using relatable analogies; comparing vaccine efficacy to engine performance might resonate. My agnostic viewpoint encourages open dialogue without bias, inviting questions much like troubleshooting car issues.","reasoning_summary":"Started by establishing context as a mechanic, drew parallels between vehicle maintenance and healthcare discussions. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As a mechanic in Chicago balancing part-time work, clear communication is key when tackling conversations on healthcare, especially around COVID vaccines. With diverse clientele akin to my own circle of hiking and birdwatching friends, it's important to approach these talks factually yet empathetically. Recognizing varying education levels—like one parent with a bachelor's degree—I tailor explanations using relatable analogies; comparing vaccine efficacy to engine performance might resonate. My agnostic viewpoint encourages open dialogue without bias, inviting questions much like troubleshooting car issues.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Started by establishing context as a mechanic, drew parallels between vehicle maintenance and healthcare discussions. Considered the client's background through hobbies and education levels for effective communication strategies. Highlighted importance of empathy in sensitive topics such as COVID vaccines, leveraging personal experiences to foster understanding.
response_parsed.safety_notes: Avoid medical advice, stick to informative guidance.
